## Question

**What would you like to know?**

Ask your question clearly and concisely.

## Context

**What have you already tried?**

Help us understand your question by providing:
- What you're trying to accomplish
- What you've already read or tried
- What you're confused about

**References:**
- [ ] I've read the [README.md](README.md)
- [ ] I've checked the [FAQ.md](FAQ.md)
- [ ] I've searched existing issues
- [ ] I've read the relevant documentation (specify below)

## urgency

**How urgent is this?**

- [ ] Blocking my work
- [ ] Need answer soon
- [ ] Curious / Not urgent

## Additional Context

**Add any other context or screenshots:**

Include code snippets, error messages, or diagrams that help explain your question.

---

**Thanks for your question!** 💭

We'll respond as soon as we can. In the meantime, check out our [documentation](https://github.com/SuperInstance/Constraint-Theory/tree/main/docs) - 150+ pages of mathematical insights and engineering details.
